name: Create-Your-Own-One-Bowl Soups
recipeInstructions:
1. Add any combinations of the following to a 2-cup saucepan:
- 1/4 cup cooked meat, poultry, or fish
- 1/4 cup cooked rice, pasta, or potatoes (or combination)
- 1 cup mixed frozen vegetables or mix your own, such as celery, onion, green beans, corn, carrots, and cabbage
- 1/2 cup canned tomatoes
- A pinch of thyme, parsley, garlic powder
- 1 small bay leaf
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Stir in a quarter teaspoon of sugar for added flavor.
4. Lay a fresh green lettuce leaf on top of the mixture (optional).
5. Cover the saucepan and bring the contents to a boil over high heat.
6. Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer gently for 20 minutes.
7. If using raw vegetables, cook them an additional 30 minutes or until they are tender.
8. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
Enjoy your customized one-bowl soup!
